preferredMetrics: Median sale price when publicly available
newsletterRules: Lead with Gwinnett County whenever current comparable data is available.
Use surrounding-county data when it adds a useful contrast or is locally relevant.
Do not force all six counties into each weekly newsletter.
Clearly identify the county, reporting period, metric definition, and source.
Do not combine incompatible listing-price and sale-price metrics.
Label Atlanta metropolitan-area figures clearly when county-level data is unavailable.
Do not present Zillow estimates as appraisals or completed sale prices.
Use only aggregate public information and never expose client or confidential MLS data.
